creator: sebastien.blanchet.fr38@gmail.com
text:
sysutils/cpuid (version 20230614) has no maintainer and seems broken for a while.

For example, then trying to print the version number with

    cpuid -v

It prints 171 lines instead of the single one with the version number.

- I would like to try to fix this package and take over the maintainership.
- It is a small C program: sloccount reports only 10,144 lines of code
- Therefore it is an ideal step to become a FreeBSD port maintainer.
